senses.gloss: to be outward, to be external, on the surface
to be visible, to become visible, to be manifest, to become manifest
to be perceptible, to become perceptible, to be obvious, to become obvious
to be clear, to become clear, to be evident, to become evident
to come to light, to appear, to emerge

examples.text: لِلنَّجَاحِ، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَرْءِ أَنْ يَشُقَّ طَرِيقًا حَتَّى عِنْدَمَا تَظْهَرُ التَّحَدِّيَاتُ.
examples.english: To succeed, one must forge a path even when challenges arise.

senses.gloss: to come out, to be published
to climb, to mount, to ascend

etymology.text: Cognate to Hebrew צהריים \ צָהֳרַיִם (tsohoráyim) and צוהר \ צֹהַר (tsóhar), and Aramaic טהרא (ṭahrā).
